_note: Consolidated mod database. Single source of truth for all mod stats, costs, descriptions, and TB effects.

Vitality._wiki_note: Wiki: +10% Health per rank, max rank 10. At rank 10 = +100% base Health. EBC=10 (common).
Vitality.name: Vitality
Vitality.description: Increases the Warframe's Health by a percentage of its base value. One of the most fundamental survivability mods in the game, found across the Origin System.
Vitality.tb_effect: Multiplies your Warframe's base HP by the listed percentage. A max-rank Vitality on a 300 HP Warframe adds +1,320 HP. Equip in a Warframe slot.

Redirection._wiki_note: Wiki: +10% Shield Capacity per rank, max rank 10. At rank 10 = +100% base Shields. EBC=10 (common).
Redirection.name: Redirection
Redirection.description: Increases the Warframe's maximum Shield Capacity. Essential for shielded Warframes such as Mag, whose survivability hinges on keeping shields topped up.
Redirection.tb_effect: Multiplies your Warframe's base shields by the listed percentage. At max rank on a 450-Shield Mag, this adds +1,980 additional shields. Equip in a Warframe slot.

Steel Fiber._wiki_note: Wiki: +10% Armor per rank, max rank 10. At rank 10 = +100% base Armor. EBC=10 (common).
Steel Fiber.name: Steel Fiber
Steel Fiber.description: Reinforces the Warframe's armor plating, increasing its damage reduction capability. Pairs well with high-armor frames or builds focused on absorbing punishment.
Steel Fiber.tb_effect: Multiplies base Armor by the listed percentage (added to base, not stacked multiplicatively). In TB, armor uses the formula: Armor / (Armor + 300) for damage reduction. More armor = less damage taken per hit.

Flow._wiki_note: Wiki: +50% Energy Max at rank 5. +10% per rank, max rank 5. EBC=20 (uncommon).
Flow.name: Flow
Flow.description: Expands the Warframe's Energy reservoir, allowing more abilities to be cast before running dry. Fundamental for ability-heavy Warframes on extended missions.
Flow.tb_effect: Multiplies your base Energy pool. At max rank on a 150-Energy Warframe, this adds +225 max Energy — allowing 3 extra 75-Energy casts per refill.

Streamline._wiki_note: Wiki: +6% Ability Efficiency per rank, max rank 5 = +30% (-30% ability energy cost). EBC=20 (uncommon).
Streamline.name: Streamline
Streamline.description: Reduces the energy cost of all Warframe abilities, making them more economical to deploy. Often the difference between two casts and three per combat turn.
Streamline.tb_effect: Reduces the Energy cost of every ability you cast. At max rank, a 100-Energy ability costs only 70 Energy. Does NOT reduce Exalted Blade's per-turn drain.

Heavy Impact._wiki_note: Wiki: Radial Knockdown on landing. TB adaptation: +4% Knockdown Chance per rank on movement abilities. EBC=10 (common).
Heavy Impact.name: Heavy Impact
Heavy Impact.description: On landing from a significant height, the Warframe emits a shockwave that knocks down nearby enemies. Originally a parkour-combat integration tool from pre-Parkour 2.0.
Heavy Impact.tb_effect: When you use Slash Dash or Radial Javelin (any ability that involves movement), all enemies in the encounter have a 20% chance to be Knocked Down for 1 turn as you land. Stacks with the ability's own CC effects.

Master Thief._wiki_note: Wiki: +6% Chance to unlock locked containers per rank, max rank 5 = +36%. TB adaptation: bonus loot roll. EBC=30 (rare).
Master Thief.name: Master Thief
Master Thief.description: Grants a chance to unlock Grineer and Corpus containers that are otherwise locked. The contents are often rare mods and blueprints unavailable from enemy drops.
Master Thief.tb_effect: Passive loot expansion. After each completed mission, grants a chance to reveal a bonus locked cache drop roll on top of normal enemy drops. Not yet implemented in TB v1.

Diamond Skin._wiki_note: Wiki: +3% Puncture Resistance per rank, max rank 5 = +15%. EBC=20 (uncommon).
Diamond Skin.name: Diamond Skin
Diamond Skin.description: Hardens the Warframe's surface against puncturing force. Reduces damage taken from Puncture sources by reinforcing the frame's outer layer with dense crystalline alloy.
Diamond Skin.tb_effect: Reduces incoming Puncture damage by the listed percentage after armor calculations. Useful against heavily armed Grineer Lancers whose Grakata fires Impact/Puncture-split rounds.

Lightning Rod._wiki_note: Wiki: +20% Electricity Damage Bonus per rank (stored arc charge). TB: store incoming Electricity damage and release it on the next attack. EBC=30 (rare).
Lightning Rod.name: Lightning Rod
Lightning Rod.description: A Warframe augment that stores latent electrical charge from the environment and from Electricity procs received in combat. When triggered, all stored charge discharges into nearby enemies.
Lightning Rod.tb_effect: When your Warframe takes an Electricity proc (from enemy or Arc/Tesla effects), store the damage. Your next attack deals the stored Electricity damage as a bonus true-type hit. Max rank stores up to 120% of the incoming arc damage.

Serration.name: Serration
Serration.description: Serrated rounds tear through targets more effectively, significantly increasing the base damage of all Rifle-class weapons. A foundational rifle mod found across the Origin System.
Serration.tb_effect: Multiplies the total damage of your equipped Primary rifle (Braton) by the listed percentage. At max rank this nearly triples rifle damage output before crits. Equip in a Primary slot.

Ammo Drum.name: Ammo Drum
Ammo Drum.description: Increases the maximum ammunition capacity for the equipped weapon. Allows Tenno to carry more spare rounds into battle before needing to resupply from fallen enemies.
Ammo Drum.tb_effect: Ammo is not tracked in TB combat. Passive benefit: reduces the chance of a 'low ammo' status being applied between missions. Full implementation planned for the field supply system.

Fast Hands.name: Fast Hands
Fast Hands.description: Trains the Tenno to reload their weapon faster through mechanical memory and optimized muscle response. Reduces the vulnerable window during which the rifle is empty.
Fast Hands.tb_effect: Reload is not tracked in TB combat. Passive benefit: grants a +1 Combo Gauge stack at the start of any turn where the Primary weapon was used in the previous turn (representing maintained momentum). Planned for future polish.

Rifle Ammo Mutation.name: Rifle Ammo Mutation
Rifle Ammo Mutation.base_effect: Convert Pistol Ammo to Rifle Ammo (1 to 1)
Rifle Ammo Mutation.max_effect: Convert Pistol Ammo to Rifle Ammo (1 to 5)
Rifle Ammo Mutation.description: A Corpus-engineered mutation cartridge that converts stray pistol rounds into compatible rifle ammunition on the fly. Extends effective combat time in the field.
Rifle Ammo Mutation.tb_effect: Ammo is not tracked in TB combat. Future implementation: after your Secondary is used, partial energy converts to +5 Primary damage on the next Basic Attack action.

Rifle Aptitude.name: Rifle Aptitude
Rifle Aptitude.description: Trains the operator's precision with rifle-class weapons, focusing on maintaining controlled trigger pressure that activates status procs more reliably.
Rifle Aptitude.tb_effect: Adds +15% to the base Status Chance on every Braton hit at max rank (base 6% → 21%). Significantly raises the floor for landing Impact, Puncture, and Slash procs per burst.

North Wind.name: North Wind
North Wind.description: Infuses rifle rounds with cryogenic compounds that bleed cold energy on impact. Each bullet carries a thin layer of frost that can slow or freeze targets.
North Wind.tb_effect: Adds Cold elemental damage to your Primary rifle. Cold procs reduce enemy damage output by -30% for 2 turns. Combines with Heat to form Blast, or with Electricity for Magnetic. Equip in a Primary slot.

Blunderbuss.name: Blunderbuss
Blunderbuss.description: Rechambers shotgun pellets to maximize contact surface area on impact, dramatically increasing the chance of inducing status effects across the pellet spread.
Blunderbuss.tb_effect: Intended for Shotgun-class primaries not yet in the starter pool. When the shotgun system launches, this mod will dramatically increase your proc rate per spread. Hold onto it.

Heated Charge.name: Heated Charge
Heated Charge.description: Packs a thermite compound into pistol charges, adding superheated plasma to each round. The burning residue ignites targets, dealing ongoing Heat damage after the initial shot.
Heated Charge.tb_effect: Adds Heat elemental damage to your Lato. Heat procs deal 12 damage/turn for 2 turns and reduce the target's armor by 50% while burning. Stacks up to 4×. Equip in a Secondary slot.

Perpetual Agony.name: Perpetual Agony
Perpetual Agony.description: Serrated pistol rounds leave shredded fragments inside target tissue. Once a Slash proc is inflicted, these fragments continue working inward — extending and deepening the bleed.
Perpetual Agony.tb_effect: Extends the duration of Slash Bleed procs (Bleeds) inflicted by your Lato from 2 turns to 3 turns at max rank. Stacks with Rifle Aptitude if both weapons proc simultaneously.

Pressure Point.name: Pressure Point
Pressure Point.description: Strikes the anatomical weak points of target organisms, amplifying physical impact. Fundamental melee damage mod — the melee equivalent of Serration.
Pressure Point.tb_effect: Multiplies the base damage of melee strikes (Skana/Exalted Blade). At max rank, Skana's 120 base damage becomes 264 before crit and combo gauge bonuses. Equip in a Melee slot.

Fever Strike.name: Fever Strike
Fever Strike.description: Coats melee blades in a virulent biological compound that deals ongoing Toxin damage. The toxin bypasses physical shielding entirely, poisoning the bloodstream directly.
Fever Strike.tb_effect: Adds Toxin elemental damage to your Skana strikes. Toxin bypasses both shields and armor — HP damage is direct. Toxin procs deal 14 dmg/turn for 2 turns and stack up to 4×. Equip in a Melee slot.

North Wind (Melee).name: North Wind (Melee)
North Wind (Melee).description: Cryogenically treated blade edges that shed ice crystals on each swing, adding Cold elemental damage to each strike.
North Wind (Melee).tb_effect: Adds Cold damage to melee. Cold procs reduce the target's outgoing damage by -30% for 2 turns. Combines with Fever Strike (Toxin) to create Viral — halving effective enemy HP for 2 turns. Equip in a Melee slot.

Heavy Trauma.name: Heavy Trauma
Heavy Trauma.description: Reinforces the melee weapon's striking surface to deliver devastating Impact force. Enemies struck by Impact-enhanced weapons experience severe staggering and disorientation.
Heavy Trauma.tb_effect: Adds Impact damage to melee strikes. Impact procs reduce enemy shield regen by 25% for 1 turn (soft stagger). Pairs well with Pressure Point for staggered, high-impact combos. Equip in a Melee slot.

Rending Strike.name: Rending Strike
Rending Strike.description: Forges serrated edge profiles and hollow-point cross sections into the blade, amplifying both Slash and Puncture damage on every swing. A dual-element physical enhancement.
Rending Strike.tb_effect: Simultaneously boosts Slash (armor-bypassing) and Puncture (reduces enemy damage) damage on your Skana. Excellent all-round melee upgrade that covers two IPS proc types. Equip in a Melee slot.

Reflex Coil.name: Reflex Coil
Reflex Coil.description: Stores kinetic energy from blocked or deflected strikes in a coiled actuator, releasing it as accelerated force on the next swing. Reduces the wind-up time on heavy attacks.
Reflex Coil.tb_effect: In TB, reduces the combo gauge cost of activating Exalted Blade by 5 stacks at max rank (you retain more combo when switching to Exalted mode). Equip in a Melee slot.

Focus Energy.name: Focus Energy
Focus Energy.description: Channels the Warframe's electric field through the blade, coating each swing with channeled Electricity. Combo strikes carry additional discharge potential, increasing proc chance per hit.
Focus Energy.tb_effect: Adds Electricity damage to melee. Every melee hit has +40% chance to grant an extra Combo Gauge stack at max rank (on top of the standard +2/hit). Pairs perfectly with Exalted Blade energy waves. Equip in a Melee slot.

Iron Phoenix.name: Iron Phoenix
Iron Phoenix.base_effect: Unlocks Iron Phoenix combo tree for Swords
Iron Phoenix.max_effect: Unlocks Iron Phoenix combo tree for Swords
Iron Phoenix.description: A Sword Combat Discipline passed down through Tenno dojos. Iron Phoenix favors controlled, linear strikes that build damage momentum — each blow flows cleanly into the next.
Iron Phoenix.tb_effect: Stance for Sword-class melee (Skana). Passive: Each consecutive melee action in the same turn adds +1 extra Combo Gauge stack (stacks with melee's base +2). Synergizes with Exalted Blade chains.

Tranquil Cleave.name: Tranquil Cleave
Tranquil Cleave.base_effect: Unlocks Tranquil Cleave combo tree for Swords
Tranquil Cleave.max_effect: Unlocks Tranquil Cleave combo tree for Swords
Tranquil Cleave.description: A measured Sword discipline emphasizing efficient cuts over frantic flurries. Practitioners of Tranquil Cleave trust the blade's weight — letting momentum do the work on every arc.
Tranquil Cleave.tb_effect: Alternative Sword stance (Skana). Passive: Melee hits inflict a guaranteed Slash proc (Bleed) on a Combo Gauge ≥ 10 — bypassing the normal status chance roll. Synergizes with high-combo Finisher setups.

Defiled Snapdragon.name: Defiled Snapdragon
Defiled Snapdragon.base_effect: Unlocks Defiled Snapdragon combo tree for Swords
Defiled Snapdragon.max_effect: Unlocks Defiled Snapdragon combo tree for Swords
Defiled Snapdragon.description: A corrupted Sword discipline recovered from Orokin Derelict vaults. The fluid, arcing strikes of Snapdragon have been defiled — the rhythm is broken, each blow deceptively unpredictable.
Defiled Snapdragon.tb_effect: Rare Sword stance (Skana). Passive: On a CRIT hit during melee, the next melee action this turn costs 0 actions (free strike). The free strike cannot itself trigger this passive again. Extremely powerful in high-combo situations.

Stance Mod (Various).name: Stance Mod (Various)
Stance Mod (Various).description: A placeholder representing a broad class of Combat Discipline mods that teach specialized melee combo routes. Different stances dramatically alter the rhythm and reach of melee attacks.
Stance Mod (Various).tb_effect: This placeholder represents a random stance from the drop table. Specific TB passive will be detailed once the exact stance is identified. Stance mods are always equippable at Rank 0 with no leveling required.
